releases.title: Movies vs Gaming Which One Tells Better Stories
releases.synopsis: Storytelling has always been one of the most powerful forms of entertainment. For decades, movies have been the dominant medium for visual storytelling, bringing emotional narratives, characters, and cinematic worlds to life. However, in recent [...] The post Movies vs Gaming Which One Tells Better Stories appeared first on Film Daily .

releases.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
releases.synopsis: Erin Burnett OutFront is an hour-long television news program hosted by Erin Burnett on CNN. The show premiered on October 3, 2011 in the 7PM and 11PM time slot to replace John King, USA. CNN said in 2011 they hoped Burnett's expected popularity would provide an "attractive" opening to an evening of "talk shows and news analysis". Erin Burnett, OutFront is broadcast live from CNN's Time Warner Center studios in New York City or on location from the site of a breaking news event, airing from 7:00 pm ET to 8:00 pm ET and also airs via tape-delay on CNN Philippines every Tuesday-Friday at 5:00 pm local time since March 17, 2015. The program covers a number of news stories of the day in a Count-up format, starting at #1 – most important and making it to #7 by the end of the hour. Burnett's program features taped packages from CNN Correspondents along with analysis and panel discussion.

releases.title: Hanzaisha
releases.synopsis: Following the sole survivor of a random mass stabbing who is given a mysterious 10-day ultimatum to live, three unlikely allies—a determined detective, an investigative reporter, and the targeted survivor—risk everything to unravel the truth behind a shocking conspiracy hiding in the dark heart of Japanese society.

releases.title: Way Too Early
releases.synopsis: The fast-paced program brings viewers everything they need to know to start their days--from news and politics to sports and pop culture.

releases.title: Blue Peter
releases.synopsis: Join Abby, Joel, Shini, Hacker T Dog and pet Henry on epic challenges and exciting adventures as we inspire you to try awesome new activities and earn your Blue Peter badge.

releases.title: Magicampers
releases.synopsis: Disney's preschool original Magicampers follows the adventures of best friends Darly and Loomis at a day camp for magical creatures on a fantastical island. Darly is half-pig and half-Pegasus, Loomis is half-donkey and half-unicorn, and their young friends are also mythical mashups of all stripes. Every day they go on incredible journeys of discovery and dream of becoming legendary, having their stories told and retold for all time. At the heart of the series, Darly and Loomis will learn that becoming a legend isn't about mastering magic powers or winning the biggest prize — it's about understanding and accepting yourself and others and working together with all kinds of friends.

releases.title: The 11th Hour with Ali Velshi
releases.synopsis: Ali Velshi delivers sharp, data-driven analysis of the day's biggest stories.

releases.title: Hello Saturday
releases.synopsis:
"Hello, Saturday" is the rebranding of the popular Chinese show "Happy Camp", hosted by He Jiong and with a fixed group of regular celebrity members.

The program showcases the talent of various stars as well as social topics through creative and diverse content and games. It aims to spread positive energy while keeping up with the current trends and leading youth culture.

releases.title: Good Morning Football
releases.synopsis: Prior to the start of the 2016 NFL regular season, NFL Network has announced a new daily morning show, Good Morning Football, premiering Monday, August 1. Hosted by Kay Adams, Nate Burleson, Peter Schrager and Kyle Brandt, and Executive Produced by Michael Davies, Good Morning Football airs live Monday–Friday at 7:00 a.m. ET on NFL Network from CBS Broadcast Center in New York City. The three-hour live show is NFL Network's first show to originate from New York City in the network's nearly 13 year history. Good Morning Football will re-air Monday–Friday starting at 10:00 a.m. ET.

releases.title: GMA3
releases.synopsis: GMA3 is a news, health, lifestyle and shopping program.

releases.title: Surgery Secrets of the Super Rich
releases.synopsis: With privileged access to elite clinics in London and Manchester, this series follows world-renowned doctors delivering bespoke, undetectable results for high-net-worth clients, revealing pioneering treatments and eye-watering price tags.

releases.title: The 700 Club
releases.synopsis: The 700 Club is a talk show featuring guests, news and spiritual stories from a Christian perspective. News stories are often related to Bible passages. Fundamentalist preacher and one-time presidential candidate Pat Robertson hosts this long-running religious show.

releases.title: CNN NewsNight with Abby Phillip
releases.synopsis: In CNN NewsNight with Abby Phillip, she delivers a thoughtful, sharp approach to the day's biggest stories.

releases.title: CBS Mornings
releases.synopsis: CBS Mornings offers a thoughtful, substantive and insightful source of news and information to a daily audience of 3 million viewers. The Emmy Award-winning broadcast presents a mix of daily news, coverage of developing stories of national and global significance, and interviews with leading figures in politics, business and entertainment.

releases.title: Today 3rd Hour
releases.synopsis: A news program intended to inform, entertain, inspire and set the agenda each morning. Each daily live broadcast provides current domestic and international news, weather reports, and interviews with newsmakers from the worlds of politics, business, media, entertainment and sports.

releases.title: The Briefing with Jen Psaki
releases.synopsis: Based in Washington, D.C., The Briefing with Jen Psaki will pull from Psaki's decades-long experiences on campaign buses, in the Oval Office, at the State Department, and in the briefing room to dissect the most important stories of the day. Every day the show will aim to help viewers better understand the happenings in Washington and around the country, how it impacts their communities, and what leaders are doing to stand up for the people they represent.

releases.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender
releases.synopsis: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.

releases.title: Al Rojo Vivo
releases.synopsis: Al Rojo Vivo is a news magazine that in one hour, takes viewers on a journey through the world. It is an "information paella" that offers something for everyone: local and international news, entertainment, fashion, live interviews, special investigations, human interest, health, consumer alerts and new technology.

releases.title: Love Island: The Debrief
releases.synopsis: The final three ladies from season 12 of Love Island (UK), Shakira Khan, Toni Laites and Yasmin Pettet discuss all the Villa gossip after each episode. Absolutely nothing is off-topic or out of the question!

releases.title: Adarsh Baal Vidyalaya
releases.synopsis: A relaxed principal tries to reform a failing public school, triggering a messy transformation as misfit teachers work to repair the system one lesson at a time.

releases.title: Home Alone
releases.synopsis: It can be a badge of honor to be “single.” “I Live Alone” is a documentary-style South Korean reality series that follows the members of a self-formed club called Rainbow, which is comprised of  celebrities who are single and live alone.

releases.title: Bares für Rares
releases.synopsis: In the show, selected applicants each present a curiosity, rarity or antique they have brought with them. Once they have received their expertise, they will have the opportunity on site to offer their exhibit to a changing five-person podium for sale and, ideally, to sell it to the highest bidder for „Bares“ ("cash").

releases.title: Stand BI Me
releases.synopsis: The show focuses on contestants navigating attraction regardless of gender, promising high-stakes drama, secret voting, and strategic romance.

releases.title: NBC News Daily
releases.synopsis: NBC News provides viewers with up-to-the-minute national and international news.

releases.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
releases.synopsis: The latest national and international news, sport and weather.

releases.title: Ekstrem gjemsel
releases.synopsis: In "Ekstrem gjemsel", 15 celebrities will compete in an extreme game of hide and seek. Presenter Victor Sotberg has his fellow presenters Christopher Omdahl and Robin Hofset with him, and together they will hunt down the participants who will be tasked with hiding as best as possible so as not to be found.

metadata.episode_name: Jeg risikerer livet for Ekstrem Gjemsel!

releases.title: Big Brother
releases.synopsis: American version of the reality game show which follows a group of HouseGuests living together 24 hours a day in the "Big Brother" house, isolated from the outside world but under constant surveillance with no privacy for three months.

releases.title: Yagami Eiko: Ueno Chuo Police Station Organized Crime Countermeasures Division
releases.synopsis: Set in the culturally diverse Ueno district of Tokyo, the story follows Eiko Yagami, a beautiful and dangerous detective in the Organized Crime Countermeasures Division (colloquially known as "Marubo"). Breaking all the rules, Yagami doesn't hesitate to use violence or ally with the Yakuza and the Chinese mafia. Her ultimate, driving goal is to uncover the truth behind the murder of her husband—a freelance journalist who dug too deep into the criminal underworld.

releases.title: LIVE with Kelly and Mark
releases.synopsis: A morning talk show with A-list celebrity guests, top-notch performances and one-of-a-kind segments that are unrivaled on daytime television, plus spontaneous, hilarious and unpredictable talk.

releases.title: Chainsmoker Cat
releases.synopsis: Catgirl Yani struggles to pay her rent and keep a job while feeding her smoking habit. As her loved ones' concerns grow, she must rethink her future.

metadata.episode_name: I'm More Straight Than Funny, Nya

releases.title: The Source with Kaitlan Collins
releases.synopsis: The Source with Kaitlan Collins - Kaitlan Collins chases the facts, asks the tough questions, and connects with her sources in primetime.

releases.title: Coração Acelerado
releases.synopsis: The musical romantic comedy tells the story of Agrado Garcia, who dreams of being a successful country singer. On the way, she meets the star João Raul, her old flame.

releases.title: Zantiis
releases.synopsis: Sila, a sharp and meticulous young CEO suffering from severe burnout and chronic insomnia, decides to go undercover to inspect his property, Zantiis Ndol Villas. Using the alias "Kin," he hopes to find some rest while secretly evaluating his staff. However, chaos ensues during the High Season when a system glitch causes his reserved room to be double-booked. Tonnam, a dedicated receptionist who lives by the motto "The Guest is God," refuses to turn the other guests away. Seeing how exhausted "Kin" looks, Tonnam offers his own accommodation—a wooden staff house by the stream—as a temporary solution, but on one condition: they must share the room. Amidst the cozy space, the soothing sounds of Muak Lek Waterfall, and Tonnam's cheerful energy, the once-cold and sleepless Sila discovers that this simple life is the perfect cure for his insomnia. He soon finds himself addicted to his new life as "Kin"—and to being the roommate of this charming receptionist.

releases.title: Masters of the Universe: Tales from Eternia
releases.synopsis: The series introduces a new generation of young fans to the iconic world of Masters of the Universe through fast-paced, action-packed mini adventures. Tales from Eternia delivers high-stakes clashes between He-Man, Skeletor, and Eternia's iconic heroes and villains, bringing the timeless conflict between good and evil to life for today's audiences.

releases.title: CNN News Central (PM)
releases.synopsis: News from around the world with Brianna Keilar and Boris Sanchez.

releases.title: Ici tout commence
releases.synopsis: This television drama series is centered around the prestigious culinary school of renowned chef Auguste Armand. The show follows the lives of students and staff as they navigate the challenges and pressures of the culinary world—delving into their personal and professional lives, revealing secrets, rivalries, and complex relationships.

releases.title: Life In The W
releases.synopsis: Through exclusive behind-the-scenes access, Life In The W captures the realities of life at the highest level of women's basketball, offering viewers a front-row seat to the sacrifices, pressures, leadership responsibilities and defining moments that come with being among the game's elite athletes.Across six episodes, audiences will experience the intensity of the WNBA season from multiple perspectives: a reigning superstar continuing to elevate the game, a leader helping shape the future of the league, and a veteran icon balancing championship aspirations with a legacy already cemented among the sport's all-time greats.

releases.title: Chris Plante: The Right Squad
releases.synopsis: Chris Plante and his "THE RIGHT SQUAD" are the most interesting, informative and funny group of talking heads in the world! It's a big claim. But it's true!

releases.title: Похищение
releases.synopsis: MVD Captain Aglaia Mezentseva and investigator Vsevolod Kosinsky, one of the best specialists in child abduction cases, are unraveling the case of the missing 5-year-old grandson of world-renowned conductor Mark Kretchetov. The child mysteriously disappeared during a walk with his nanny, and the woman herself was hit on the head and lost her memory. Literally all members of the Kretchetov family fall under suspicion, and Kosinsky spares no one in his pursuit of results. Aglaia disapproves of Kosinsky's methods, but nevertheless becomes his best student. The more Aglaia untangles the web of complex family relationships and financial machinations within the Kretchetov family, the more she has to sacrifice – her peace of mind, her career, the lives and feelings of others. And even put her unborn child at risk.

releases.title: 10 NEWS+
releases.synopsis: 10 NEWS+ will follow Network 10's 5pm local news bulletins across the country, offering viewers extended context and deeper reporting on the day's biggest stories. The 5pm bulletin remains a cornerstone of the network's trusted news offering, delivering the latest breaking news and updates.10 NEWS+ aims to redefine evening news by providing comprehensive analysis, trusted reporting, and long-form investigative journalism. The program will offer a fresh perspective on critical local and global stories, tailored for an engaged audience seeking in-depth news coverage.At a time when misinformation is rife, 10 NEWS+ is steadfast in its commitment to truth and transparency, delivering journalism with integrity, clarity, and purpose.Designed for Australia's evolving media landscape, 10 NEWS+ will integrate across broadcast, streaming, digital, and social platforms, ensuring content is accessible and engaging for Australians everywhere.The program will be anchored Sunday to Thursday by investigative journalist Denham Hitchcock and Walkley Award-winning journalist Amelia Brace, with Senior Journalist and respected news anchor Ursula Heger and National Affairs Editor Hugh Riminton leading coverage every Friday.

releases.title: Suidooster
releases.synopsis: Suidooster is a South African television soap opera produced by Suidooster Films which revolves around a matriarch, her family, friends and the people of Suidooster, a small shopping and business centre in the fictional Cape Town suburb of Ruiterbosch.

releases.title: CNN News Central
releases.synopsis: Anchored by John Berman, Kate Bolduan and Sara Sidner, CNN News Central is the core hub of the network's best-in-class newsgathering operation during the day, bringing stories to viewers in real time, while offering perspective and context to key issues. Modeled after CNN's special election programming, CNN News Central uses similar technology and storytelling tools, and applies them to news well beyond politics. The immersive approach will showcase what CNN does best – breaking news, visual storytelling, and factual, impactful reporting.

releases.title: Inside Politics
releases.synopsis: Dana Bash features the top political stories, sourced by the best reporters.

releases.title: Bianca Across the Nation
releases.synopsis: Bianca de la Garza tackles the big news from D.C., N.Y., across America, and around the world!

releases.title: Cuomo
releases.synopsis: Chris Cuomo hosts CUOMO, a no-nonsense show featuring the day's most important news from all perspectives. CUOMO airs weeknights at 8 p.m./7C on NewsNation.

releases.title: Yiran's Silver Linings
releases.synopsis: Li Yiran returns to Lecang, a small town in the southwest. Eight years apart have driven a wedge between Li Yiran and her mom. By a twist of fate, the two find themselves taking charge of the town's "life's major events." As they face one heartbreaking yet heartwarming story after another, Li Yiran begins to see life and regret in a new light. And quietly, her relationship with her mom starts to shift...

releases.title: The Shadow Sovereign
releases.synopsis: Princess Zhao Yang, Li Shu, is born to a low-ranking concubine and grows up in the Cold Palace, where she endures years of neglect because of her mother's humble status. Through her intelligence and political acumen, she earns a place in the Crown Prince's faction. Yet after leaving the Cold Palace, she becomes nothing more than a pawn in his political game. Three years later, Emperor Bing Qian reforms the imperial examination system by reviving the Xiao Lian recommendation system to curb the influence of the powerful noble clans. At the banquet honoring the newly crowned scholars, Li Shu is publicly impeached by Shen Xiao, the top scholar from a humble background. With the emperor quietly orchestrating events behind the scenes, Shen Xiao leads the rising commoner officials in challenging the aristocratic families and their monopoly on power. As Li Shu and Shen Xiao confront each other, they become locked in a fierce political rivalry. Determined to break free from her loveless marriage and the Crown Prince's control, Li Shu uses her public clashes with Shen Xiao as a cover while secretly cultivating the influence of talented commoners. Together, they gradually weaken the corrupt Crown Prince's faction and reshape the empire's balance of power.

releases.title: Tomorrow Is Ours
releases.synopsis: The story revolves around the people of Sète, France. Their lives are punctuated by family rivalries, romance and scenes from daily life, but also by plots involving police investigations, secrets and betrayals.

releases.title: Jornal Nacional
releases.synopsis: Jornal Nacional is a Brazilian Emmy-winning primetime news program aired by Rede Globo since September 1, 1969. It was the first news program broadcast live by a television network throughout Brazil.

releases.title: Wake Up America Early
releases.synopsis: Wake up to reliable reporting that delivers the essential facts you need to start your day informed, along with expert commentary and thoughtful analysis. Get an early look at the top stories shaping national and global conversations. Whether it's politics, business, culture, or breaking news, you'll be prepared for whatever the day brings.

releases.title: National Report
releases.synopsis: National Report with Shaun Kraisman and Emma Rechenberg for live breaking news from NY and Washington, on politics, health, finance, and lifestyle that impact you.

releases.title: CBS News 24/7
releases.synopsis: Live news and top stories on CBS News 24/7.

releases.title: WNBA Countdown
releases.synopsis: WNBA Countdown serves as the primer for game telecasts on both ESPN2 and ESPN. It features a less-scripted format, highlighted by a lively round-table discussion and debate of the top story lines around the league.

releases.title: Rob Schmitt Tonight
releases.synopsis: Rob Schmitt Tonight locks in all the late-breaking stories that matter to you, and delivers the up-to-the-minute news you need to hear before turning in.

releases.title: ABC Prime with Linsey Davis
releases.synopsis: Providing prime-time context and analysis of the day's top stories, as well as in-depth reporting and storytelling from around the country and the globe.

releases.title: My Husband Is a Mafia Boss
releases.synopsis: Join the sweet and naïve Aemie as she navigates married life with mafia boss husband Zeke, and the dangerous world she's about to enter.

releases.title: TFI Unplugged
releases.synopsis: With the biggest bands performing exclusive intimate sets and unfiltered conversations with A-list celebrity guests, TFI Unplugged is the place where anything can happen. Chris Evans reinvents your favourite television institution for 2026.

releases.title: Morning in America
releases.synopsis: Morning in America is NewsNation's live national morning newscast hosted by Markie Martin.

releases.title: Wake Up America
releases.synopsis: Start your day and weekend with real news and analysis from Rob Finnerty, Michael Grimm & Sarah Williamson and team.

releases.title: NewsNation Live with Marni Hughes
releases.synopsis: NewsNation Live with Marni Hughes brings you a fast-paced look at the latest from the border to Main Street to the White House and around the globe.

releases.title: NewsNation Live with Nichole Berlie
releases.synopsis: The day's top news headlines with reports from correspondents around the country.

releases.title: The Moment with Katy Tur
releases.synopsis: The Moment with Katy Tur is designed to move beyond the immediate headlines to provide deeper context and understanding of the political and national stories shaping the day.

releases.title: American Agenda
releases.synopsis: American Agenda with hosts Bob Brooks & Katrina Szish is a live, fast-paced look at national news and international events. The program brings viewers the latest from Washington, with insightful analysis from lawmakers and experts, and media reports from New York and around the globe.

releases.title: Carl Higbie Frontline
releases.synopsis: Carl Higbie Frontline focuses on providing commonsense news analysis, exposing big government overreach and the media's shortfalls — all while always fighting for American values. Produced from Newsmax's Manhattan studios covering breaking news and exploring key issues such as personal liberty, security, and government transparency.

releases.title: The Weeknight
releases.synopsis: One-on-one conversations with politicians and newsmakers, and the breaking issues of the day.

releases.title: Finnerty
releases.synopsis: Finnerty will look to cut through the noise to bring unfiltered truth, sharp debates, and a focus on the most pressing issues facing America today while standing up for American values.

releases.title: On Balance with Leland Vittert
releases.synopsis: The day's hottest subjects.

releases.title: Resort
releases.synopsis: A debt-ridden room service boy rises to challenge a ruthless kitchen at a luxurious beachside haven.

releases.title: The Story Is with Elex Michaelson
releases.synopsis: The Story Is will feature live nightly panels and debates on set featuring a range of voices including attorneys Gloria Allred and Areva Martin, conservative talk radio hosts Larry Elder and Jennifer Horn, progressive podcast host Brian Tyler Cohen, former California GOP chair Jessica Millan Patterson and journalists Peter Hamby from Puck and POLITICO's Melanie Mason.

releases.title: CNN This Morning
releases.synopsis: Start your day with Audie Cornish bringing you the latest headlines and analysis.

releases.title: TODAY with Jenna & Sheinelle
releases.synopsis: America's feel-good morning show with big stars and sweet surprises; Jenna Bush Hager and Sheinelle Jones host an hour of heartfelt connection, inspirational stories, fun and laughs.

releases.title: On the Line with Alicia Menendez
releases.synopsis: On the Line with Alicia Menendez moves beyond the headlines to examine the stories shaping the nation, featuring one-on-one conversations with newsmakers and a focus on voices often left out of the political discourse

releases.title: Snapping Golden Bough
releases.synopsis: Amid fierce court rivalries in the Great Wei Dynasty, Shen Suhe is forced to marry the Second Prince, enduring humiliation before losing her family and life. Reborn on her wedding day, she pretends to be foolish to uncover the truth, joining forces with Prince Yu, Mu Yunzheng, to clear the injustice, defeat the Empress and the Fourth Prince, and eventually live in seclusion together.

releases.title: Alliance
releases.synopsis: Alliance is a competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare. Sixteen celebrities are split into four teams, battling through physical and mental challenges to earn points - the only currency inside a mysterious HQ run by the System. Face the Ace's power, survive weekly votes, and rebuild alliances every reset.

releases.title: Come Home Love: Lo and Behold
releases.synopsis: Hung Sue Gan starting from the bottom, established his own logistics company, which is now running smoothly. His only concern now are his three daughters. His eldest daughter has immigrated overseas. His second daughter Hung Yeuk Shui has reached the marriageable age, but has no hopes for marriage anytime soon. She is constantly bickering with her younger sister Hung Sum Yue, who is an honour student, over trivial matters, causing their father to not know whether to laugh or cry. Hung Sue Yan, Hung Sue Gan's brother, moves in with the family, temporarily ending his life as a nomadic photographer. He joins Hung Yeuk Shui's company and encounters Ko Pak Fei, the director of an online shop. The two appear to be former lovers, making for lots of laughter. Since Hung Sue Yan moved in, a series of strange events have occurred in the family. Upon investigation, the source is traced to Lung Ging Fung, a promising young man who is the son of department store mogul Lung Gam Wai.

releases.title: The Record with Greta Van Susteren
releases.synopsis: Award-winning journalist Greta Van Susteren digs into the top stories of the day with the focus on why they matter to the American people. Greta speaks with the top newsmakers on both sides of the aisle, creating a conversation and dialogue that is imperative for the nation's well-being.

releases.title: The Hill
releases.synopsis: The Hill on NewsNation combines the power of two trusted news sources into one must-watch hour. The Hill, the nation's #1 political website, and NewsNation, America's fastest-growing cable news network, team up to define today's most-pressing issues, and question Washington's power brokers on what matters most to the people they serve and what matters most to Americans.

releases.title: ABC News Live
releases.synopsis: ABC News Live will bring streaming viewers the latest headlines, compelling stories, interviews and roundtable discussions.

releases.title: America Reports
releases.synopsis: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts

releases.title: NewsNation Live With Connell McShane
releases.synopsis: Connell McShane presents reports and analysis of the day's national and international newsworthy events.

releases.title: Greg Kelly Reports
releases.synopsis: The hardest-hitting stories from coast to coast: We take you from the Beltway to the Rust Belt and beyond — never forgetting we're here to enlighten, expose, inform, and spotlight the stories that matter to you.

releases.title: Amanpour & Co.
releases.synopsis: Featuring conversations with global leaders and decision makers on the issues affecting the world today, Amanpour and Company adds to the long tradition of public affairs programming that has been a hallmark of public media for decades.

releases.title: Unsettled Case
releases.synopsis: One cold case per unit, two units per season. The debut season of Unsettled Case focuses on two units: "The Jewelry Store Serial Robbery" and "The Bianji Hotel Robbery." Within a time rift that moves against the grain, it deconstructs how crime reshapes a person, while also telling a story of how faith can redeem a soul.

releases.title: Guardián de Mi Vida
releases.synopsis: Sofía Peralta-Avitia runs her family's powerful business empire while trapped in an unhappymarriage to Gonzalo Balmori-Ricci, a serial cheater obsessed with a much younger woman namedGrecia. Her life takes an unexpected turn when Franco Gallardo, a humble man from thecountryside, becomes her bodyguard. What begins as a professional relationship soon blossomsinto a love strong enough to challenge Gonzalo's ambition, jealousy, and desire for control.Meanwhile, Sofía's daughter, Bárbara "Barbi," finds love with her new bodyguard, Salvador "Chava"Reyes, a man haunted by a troubled past. But prejudice, family secrets, and long-standing rivalriesthreaten to tear them apart.Amid deception, passion, and family conflict, Sofía and Franco will discover that finding happinessmay require risking everything.

releases.title: No Way! My Bro Is the Emperor
releases.synopsis: Senior slacker Gu Bei is transported back in time and becomes a frontier general. After spending three carefree years living off the success of Xiaoyao Pavilion, an imperial decree summons him back to the capital, where he discovers that Emperor Xiao Ce is actually his former roommate. One dreams of taking it easy and becoming the richest man alive, while the other is determined to become one of history's greatest emperors. Together, the two brothers use modern thinking to outsmart corrupt officials, take down powerful drug lords, fend off western invaders, and hilariously rewrite their destinies in the ancient world.

releases.title: Wind-Born Warriors
releases.synopsis: During a small-scale military exercise, Guo Zijian grows frustrated with the routine formalism. He issues a false order demanding real combat, sparking chaos, yet wins recognition from his superiors. After setbacks including a tactical blunder and temporary discharge, he returns to the army to lead a new-type combined arms unit. Under his command, the unit shines in a live-fire evaluation, waging a battle fit for a new era of warfare.

releases.title: She Who Blazes
releases.synopsis: In Kuizhou, beauty is measured by curves, while slim women are looked down upon. After inheriting her grandmother's Yanzhi Pavilion, Fang Zhuozhuo discovers a magical rouge made from the rare Qionghua blossom that transforms her into the voluptuous beauty Qingcheng, the pavilion's celebrated mistress. To fulfill her grandmother's final wish by winning the prestigious Beauty Selection Ceremony, she must secure a steady supply of Qionghua, a flower that grows only in the private garden of the Governor's residence. Determined to obtain the blossoms, Zhuozhuo marries Chu Shengyi, the Governor's third son. When her deception is exposed on their wedding day, she is reduced to the status of a concubine. Each enters the marriage with hidden motives: Zhuozhuo seeks the precious flowers, while Shengyi hopes to use Qingcheng's identity to rescue his true love, Ye Xin, from the manipulative Lady Li. After the Qionghua garden is destroyed in a fire, the two journey together to the black market in search of new seeds. As they cultivate the flowers side by side, an unexpected bond blossoms between them. Shengyi eventually discovers that Zhuozhuo and Qingcheng are one and the same. Joining forces, they rescue Ye Xin and uncover Lady Li's long-buried crimes, including the murder of Shengyi's birth mother, exposing her before all. With the outdated obsession for voluptuous beauty finally abandoned, Zhuozhuo takes rightful charge of Yanzhi Pavilion under her own name, while Shengyi promises to wait for her return.

releases.title: Wonderland
releases.synopsis: A social experiment reality show about the cultivation of an ideal community, inviting 15 guests to Taohuawu, 15KM away from the city center, to live together for 21 days, creating an ideal society in their hearts. See how they live, work, and live in harmony in friction and cooperation. It is also a journey to explore the source of material and spiritual consensus.

releases.title: Emmerdale
releases.synopsis: The lives of several families in the Yorkshire Dales revolve around a farm and the nearby village. With murders, affairs, lies, deceit, laughter and tears, it's all there in the village.

releases.title: Club Friday
releases.synopsis: Based on a Thai radio show that gives love advice to callers, this series dramatizes stories of infidelity, love triangles, sexual identity and more.

releases.title: Elizabeth Vargas Reports
releases.synopsis: In-depth coverage of the biggest news stories of the day; NewsNation's home for exclusive and enterprise reporting; hosted live by Elizabeth Vargas.

releases.title: Katie Pavlich Tonight
releases.synopsis: Katie Pavlich Tonight offers a conservative take on the day's events while welcoming all viewpoints. The goal: cutting through left-right bias in pursuit of plain facts and honest analysis.

releases.title: Portland Street Operation
releases.synopsis: Twenty years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit. Liang Zhiqiang, once the deadliest enforcer of the Heyi Syndicate, returns to find his sworn buddy Xie Guanhong now rules the underworld and has married his ex-lover Zheng Baojiao. Liang tries to go straight, finding solace in a flower shop and a new love with a teacher, Danni. But the old world drags him back through shadows of past crimes, shifting loyalties, and a truth that shatters everything. He learns that the underworld never forgets. This time, he bets it all, not for brotherhood, but for the people he truly cares about.

releases.title: Money, Power, Politics with Stephanie Ruhle
releases.synopsis: Money, Power, Politics with Stephanie Ruhle, utilizing her extensive Wall Street background to analyze the high-stakes intersection of money, power, and politics, Stephanie Ruhle delivers original reporting and hard-hitting interviews on the stories that directly affect Americans' lives. The program focuses on business and political news, featuring the "Nightcap" roundtable segment from her previous show, The 11th Hour

releases.title: Jesse Weber Live
releases.synopsis: A fresh, fast-paced, and often unexpected take on the day's headlines, diving into the biggest stories through the lens of an expert in legal affairs.

releases.title: Bargain Hunt
releases.synopsis: Two teams of amateur collectors have an hour at an antiques fair in which to acquire the best bargains possible.

releases.title: Chronicles of the Sun
releases.synopsis: Claire is surprised when she gets arrested for the murder of her childhood friend after she returns to Montpellier.

releases.title: ABC News Live First
releases.synopsis: ABC News Live First will bring streaming viewers the latest headlines, compelling stories, interviews and roundtable discussions.

releases.title: ABC News Live Reports
releases.synopsis: ABC News Live Reports is the rare national newscast based in Los Angeles, in what the network is billing as an "outside the Beltway" focus on politics for the 2024 election cycle.

releases.title: Erlong Lake: Blossoms of Hometown Dreams
releases.synopsis: Security Zhang Hao bragged to his villagers in Erlong Lake village. To cover it up, he had to transform into a commercial genius, claiming to have brought "enormous investments" back with him and returned with a "professional team". His return coincided with his long-time friend, Li Minghan, a graduate student who had devoted herself wholeheartedly to her hometown's development and rural revitalization efforts. In this unique context of northeastern rural China, where the two people vastly differ in terms of their origins, working styles, and educational backgrounds, they offer a series of punch lines that harmoniously blend differences. As the hope of the entire village, Zhang Hao, unwittingly becomes the common target of 'tiger parenting' and at the same time, eager for success but lacking both business acumen and experience, becomes a prey to the scams.

releases.title: A Winter Sun Wakes the Wind in Spring Hills' Dream
releases.synopsis: Seeking refuge in the mountains, a famous actor falls for a tea farmer, where love blooms between two vastly different worlds.

releases.title: The Arena with Kasie Hunt
releases.synopsis: Kasie Hunt brings key players into the arena for sharp analysis and panel discussion on the latest news in politics and culture.

releases.title: Ed Henry the Big Take
releases.synopsis: Ed Henry offers his common-sense take on the news.

releases.title: 10's Late News
releases.synopsis: Ursula Heger, a senior journalist at 10 News First, will anchor the newly reintroduced news bulletin. Having been with the network since 2011, Heger has covered significant events, including the Ukraine conflict, the demise of Queen Elizabeth II, and other critical global stories.Channel 10 states the bulletin aims to offer viewers a detailed wrap-up of the day's major stories, delivered in a digital-first format that allows audiences to tune in from any device, at their convenience.

releases.title: WWE Friday Night SmackDown
releases.synopsis: The superstars of World Wrestling Entertainment's "SmackDown" brand collide each and every Friday on WWE Friday Night SmackDown.

releases.title: An Là
releases.synopsis: National, international and local news from the BBC Alba team.

releases.title: The Truth
releases.synopsis: The program tells the story of six new residents who work together to uncover the ultimate truth about Apartment 11 as they deduce a mysterious case.

releases.title: Chiikawa
releases.synopsis: The story follows the sometimes happy, sometimes sad, and a tad stressful daily life of "some sort of small, cute creature" (Nanka Chiisakute Kawaii Yatsu) known as Chiikawa. Chiikawa enjoys delicious food with bees and rabbits, toils hard every day for the rewards of work, and still maintains a smile.

releases.title: Soul Land 2: The Peerless Tang Clan
releases.synopsis: The Tang Sect in a turbulent world. There is nothing but martial spirit here. Ten thousand years after the founding of the Tang Sect, it is in relative decline. An extremely talented man was born. Can the new Shrek Seven Monsters revive the Tang Sect and bring it back to glory? A soul beast of over one million years old; Electrolux who can pick stars; The new soul utensil system that led to the decline of the Tang Sect... A lot of secrets are to be revealed. Can the secret weapons of the Tang Sect be sharp again? Can the Tang Sect regain its former glory?

releases.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime
releases.synopsis: Corporate worker Mikami Satoru is stabbed by a random killer, and is reborn to an alternate world. But he turns out to be reborn a slime! Thrown into this new world with the name Rimuru, he begins his quest to create a world that’s welcoming to all races.

releases.title: Deadliest Catch
releases.synopsis: Forty-foot waves, 700 pound crab pots, freezing temperatures and your mortality staring you in the face…it's all in a day's work for these modern day prospectors. During each episode we will watch crews race to meet their quota and make it home safely.

releases.title: Supreme God Emperor
releases.synopsis: Ten thousand years after his betrayal, Immortal King Mu Yun awakens in the body of a "useless" young man. With hidden alchemy skills and the Slaughter Immortal Diagram, he cures Qin Mengyao, uncovering her Ice Phoenix spirit. As their bond grows, jealous rival Dongfang Yu seeks revenge. Mu Yun embarks on a training journey—unaware assassins await their chance to strike.

releases.title: Saccharine
releases.synopsis: After succumbing to an obscure weight-loss craze involving the eating of human ashes, lovelorn medical student Hana finds herself haunted by the ghost of the person she's eating.

releases.title: Паша
releases.synopsis: Pasha Belov is a native Muscovite, studied at Gnesinka, and he is also half Uzbek with pronounced Oriental features. But here's the problem — Pasha doesn't know anything about his "Uzbek side" because he was born and raised in a Russian family. At the age of 32, he did not become a musician and works as a piano tuner, still lives with his mother, borrows money from his older brother and obeys his grandmother in everything. Nothing bothers Pasha himself, he just goes with the flow. But one day, being forced to move in with a friend, Tolya, a broken tooth, financial problems, and a sudden acquaintance with a failed actress, Zhenya, make him realize that tuning a piano is still easier than his own life. "Pasha" is an ironic and warm dramedy about life in a big city, the difficulties of growing up and family values. It's a story about not having to become someone to be yourself.

releases.title: Bittersweet Love
releases.synopsis: A poor young man trapped in a sham marriage falls for his wife’s older brother, risking everything for forbidden love.

releases.title: Great Escape
releases.synopsis: Cast members work together to escape a secret room.

releases.title: 5 News at 5
releases.synopsis: National and international news.

releases.title: One World with Zain Asher and Bianna Golodryga
releases.synopsis: Offering a fresh and inclusive take on the top stories from Africa, Europe and beyond, giving every continent an equal voice.

releases.title: The Brief with Jim Sciutto
releases.synopsis: The best of CNN's reporting from correspondents across the world, to guide global audiences through the fast-paced news cycle with insight, analysis and hard-hitting interviews.

releases.title: Become a Farmer
releases.synopsis: A labor documentary interactive reality show that selects 10 young individuals to form the 'Farming Squad,' which will authentically document their entire process of operating a farm on 142.8 acres of land over 190 days. This includes sowing, irrigating, fertilizing, and harvesting, as well as live-streaming their sales to establish a self-sustaining farmers' market.

releases.title: Eternal Rain
releases.synopsis: Two women clash for the leadership of the powerful Tinara dynasty in this intense family drama. Fakfah has spent her life proving she is the rightful heir, but her world shakes when her lifelong enemy Phapwat returns to take it all away. Using Fakfah's closest ally as a pawn, Phapwat initiates a brutal war for control. Amidst death and betrayal, they battle for honor and love in a game where there can be only one winner.

releases.title: Anupamaa
releases.synopsis: Anupama had to sacrifice a lot to become an ideal wife, daughter-in-law, and mother. After a bitter realisation, she sets out to live on her own terms.

releases.title: Pushpa Impossible
releases.synopsis: Pushpa Impossible is the story about a feisty middle-aged woman having studied until grade 9 in a Gujarati medium school and going back to school at the age of 44! She is boisterous, uncouth, impulsive, hardworking and an endearingly loveable mother of three children. She is Pushpa Patel hailing from a small town Patan in Gujarat and now residing at Bapodra Chawl in Mumbai. The show is a peek into her day-to-day struggles, her small victories, her Juggad, her shortcomings, and her constant pursuit of living a good life while struggling as a full-time mother and part-time businesswoman. The show is an autobiography of a mother, who decides to go back to school and change her life by impacting many lives!

releases.title: Dreams of Freedom
releases.synopsis: Begoña Montes is a woman who lives trapped in a toxic marriage and seeks the long-awaited freedom in Spain in 1958.

releases.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
releases.synopsis: Set in South Jamaica, Queens, in 1991, this prequel to "Power" revolves around the coming of age of Kanan Stark.

releases.title: The Forbidden Land
releases.synopsis: Zhang Chao, a quiet and withdrawn student, finds himself at odds with a school bully while seeking the truth behind his roommate’s mysterious death. As he digs deeper, he unravels a hidden secret about his past, embarking on a transformative journey of friendship, redemption, and self-discovery.

releases.title: Gardening Australia
releases.synopsis: Gardening Australia provides practical, realistic and credible horticultural and gardening advice, inspiring and entertaining Australian gardeners around the nation.

releases.title: The Demon Hunter
releases.synopsis: Meng Chuan witnessed his mother killed before his eyes, so he trained very hard hoping to one day avenge her death. But his peaceful days were broken as his wedding engagement being called off, an invasion by foreign forces, the sanctuary fallen into enemy hands… In order to protect the people of Ning City, he picked up his sword and vowed to be the strongest. This is a heavy responsibility and a long journey…

releases.title: The Exiled Heavy Knight Knows How to Game the System
releases.synopsis: Born into a prestigious family of master swordsmen, Elymas Edvaughn's future shatters when he awakens the so-called "defective" Heavy Knight class. Disowned and cast out, he regains memories of another life—and realizes this world mirrors a VR game he once mastered. Armed with knowledge no one else possesses, he sets out to rewrite his fate and prove the strength of the "weakest" class.

releases.title: Love Actually
releases.synopsis: This is a show that focuses on the brave and straightforward love of ordinary adults from late 20s to mid-40s. It concerns relationships, marriage, and a multitude of social interactions. The show will invite 12 men and women to stay under the same roof for 30 days. Some may become couples in the end while others might part ways. In the TV studio, the celebrities and the ordinary people will gather together to follow the series and share their opinions and experience about love.

releases.title: Bom Dia Brasil
releases.synopsis: This show features the main news in Brazil and the world in a magazine format, with commentary on politics, economy, sports and gastronomy.

releases.title: The First 48
releases.synopsis: The First 48 follows detectives from around the country during these first critical hours as they race against time to find the suspect. Gritty and fast-paced, it takes viewers behind the scenes of real-life investigations with unprecedented access to crime scenes, autopsies, forensic processing, and interrogations.

releases.title: Big Brother
releases.synopsis: Portuguese version of the reality competition which follows a group of HouseGuests living together 24 hours a day in the "Big Brother" house, isolated from the outside world but under constant surveillance with no privacy.

releases.title: Beyond the Gates
releases.synopsis: A powerful and prestigious family reigns over a posh gated community with juicy secrets and scandals waiting to be uncovered.

releases.title: The Chinese Restaurant
releases.synopsis: Chinese Restaurant is a Chinese celebrity reality show broadcast by Hunan Television.It's Vicky Zhao's first reality/variety show as a regular guest.

releases.title: The Young and the Restless
releases.synopsis: The rivalries, romances, hopes and fears of the residents of the fictional Midwestern metropolis, Genoa City. The lives and loves of a wide variety of characters mingle through the generations, dominated by the Newman, Abbott, Baldwin and Winters families.

releases.title: Love Island
releases.synopsis: A stunning cast engages in the ultimate game of love, as they land in a sunshine paradise in search of passion and romance. Each of the glamorous members of the public will live like celebrities in a luxury villa, but in order to stay there, they will not only have to win over the hearts of each other, but also the hearts of the public.

releases.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
releases.synopsis: Continuing drama combining romance and intrigue set against the glittering backdrop of Beverly Hills and the American fashion industry.

releases.title: Sweet Tasks
releases.synopsis: Taking look on the day-to-day work schedule of literary and art workers as the starting point, it uses the three stages of meeting, observation, and dialogue to demonstrate professionalism, moral character, and positive values. To promote the fighting spirit and creative spirit of professionals from all walks of life in a general way.

releases.title: The Alliance
releases.synopsis: Sixteen participants live together. They are divided into teams and have to compete & win their assignments. But in the end, it's every man for himself, because at the end of every month, only one person wins a hundred thousand euros.

releases.title: Chum
releases.synopsis: A newlywed couple joins friends on a Mediterranean yacht excursion, only to find themselves caught between a predatory shark and a psychopathic killer in their midst-transforming a sun-drenched escape into a fight for survival.

releases.title: The Patrick Star Show
releases.synopsis: Follow a younger Patrick Star living at home with his family, where he hosts his own variety show for the neighborhood from his television-turned-bedroom.

releases.title: Kelders van Geheime
releases.synopsis: Kelders van Geheime (Cellars of Secrets) is a South African, Afrikaans-language telenovela based on the wheeling's and dealings of the community that lives on Soebatskloof (a wine farm in the Cape). The series focuses on three families: the Abrahams, Syster and Marais households. These families will have to stand together, agree (or agree to disagree), and work together to earn their bread and butter – and a glass of wine.

releases.title: SINGER
releases.synopsis:
SINGER, formerly known as I AM A SINGER, is a large-scale singing competition program co-produced by Hunan Broadcasting System (HBS) and Mango TV.

The first four seasons were adapted from the Korean reality show I Am a Singer produced by MBC. Beginning with the 2017 season, the program was rebranded as SINGER.

The series brings together established vocalists from the Chinese music industry as well as internationally renowned artists to compete on stage. In each episode, the results are determined by a panel of 500 in-studio audience judges who vote to decide the singers’ rankings and eliminations.

Starting with the 2024 season, the show shifted from pre-recorded broadcasts to fully live performances and introduced an additional panel of 500 online international audience judges.

releases.title: Plus belle la vie, encore plus belle
Familie
releases.synopsis: 'Familie' is the longest running Belgian soap opera. The Van den Bossches originally had an electronics company, later a holding company that included a clothing chain and a sandwich shop. In the meantime, we closely follow the personal lives of the Van den Bossches and their entourage. Grandma Anna and all her children and grandchildren have been through a lot over time and it doesn't look like their lives will become calmer any time soon.

releases.title: Power of Love
releases.synopsis: A group of competitive women and men come together in The Power of Love to find their dream partner. Every week, some contestants win the weekly prize, while others say goodbye to their dreams of love and the house. Emotional moments, surprises, and exciting challenges await in this thrilling season!

releases.title: Iskole
releases.synopsis: To escape a forced marriage to a wealthy businessman, a dedicated teacher leaves her city life behind for a transfer to a remote rural village. There, she discovers a gifted young dancer and vows to nurture her talent. When a corrupt politician threatens to close down the underfunded village school, she joins forces with passionate fellow teachers and a kind-hearted local entrepreneur. Together, they rally the community to save the school, while she fights to protect mistreated village children and resist her family's relentless pressure to return home.

releases.title: General Hospital
releases.synopsis: Families, friends, enemies and lovers experience life-changing events in the large upstate New York city of Port Charles, which has a busy hospital, upscale hotel, cozy diner and dangerous waterfront frequented by the criminal underworld.

releases.title: Rock, Paper, Scissors
releases.synopsis: Rock, Paper, and Scissors are best friends and roommates who compete over everything, but it’s (mostly) all love. They each bring something different to the friendship - Rock is the moral compass, Paper is the practical one, and Scissors is the right amount of chaos. Together, they get into the wildest adventures.

releases.title: The Frontier Lord Begins with Zero Subjects
releases.synopsis: The war is over, and hero Dias is finally rewarded with land of his own—only to discover it's a barren frontier with no people, no villages, and no sign of civilization. With nothing but endless grassland ahead of him, Dias sets out to build a domain from the ground up. But after meeting Alna, a mysterious girl with a blue horn, his lonely frontier is about to spring to life.

metadata.episode_name: The Frontier Lord and His First Visitor

releases.title: Seher Hone Ko Hai
releases.synopsis: Strong-willed Kausar defies societal barriers for her daughter Seher’s big dreams, but will destiny stand by their side?

releases.title: Animal Park
releases.synopsis: Cute critters and caring keepers. Kate Humble and Ben Fogle explore Longleat Safari Park, meeting a host of exotic, fascinating animals and the people who look after them.

releases.title: Happy Together
releases.synopsis: Happy Together is a Korean entertainment talk show.

releases.title: MotorWeek
releases.synopsis: This award-winning weekly automotive magazine provides unbiased, consumer-oriented car news with feature stories on related topics.

releases.title: Evening Drink Style
releases.synopsis: "Evening Drink Style" (Banshaku no Ryugi) is a popular Japanese drama about Miyuki Izawa's ritual of crafting the perfect meal to pair with her end-of-day drink, often beer, emphasizing simple pleasures, moderation, home cooking, and work-life balance, a concept resonating with viewers seeking relaxing, relatable content with culinary inspiration. It's known for its calming vibe, focus on delicious food pairings (like lamb with soy-ginger sauce), and promoting a healthy approach to enjoying alcohol.

releases.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
releases.synopsis: Deep down in the Pacific Ocean in the subterranean city of Bikini Bottom lives a square yellow sponge named SpongeBob SquarePants. SpongeBob lives in a pineapple with his pet snail, Gary, loves his job as a fry cook at the Krusty Krab, and has a knack for getting into all kinds of trouble without really trying. When he's not getting on the nerves of his cranky next door neighbor Squidward, SpongeBob can usually be found smack in the middle of all sorts of strange situations with his best buddy, the simple yet lovable starfish, Patrick, or his thrill-seeking surfer-girl squirrel pal, Sandy Cheeks.

releases.title: Maayavi
releases.synopsis: Following an unexpected housing arrangement, three individuals find their lives deeply entangled in a complex web of love and deception. What starts as a simple search for stability quickly tests family loyalty and personal morals as hidden motives surface. Balancing intense romantic tension with lighthearted comedy, the narrative highlights the heavy sacrifices made for love and the consequences of hidden truths.

releases.title: Love, Siargao
releases.synopsis: It follows Jao and Kara, two strangers bitten by different versions of this curse, whose clashing principles lead them through the highs and lows of a modern romance that forever changes their destinies.

releases.title: On Patrol: Live
releases.synopsis: "On Patrol: Live" follows police officers and sheriff's deputies from diverse agencies in different cities across the country for three hours. Program hosts Dan Abrams, retired Tulsa Police Department Sgt. Sean "Sticks" Larkin and Deputy Sheriff Curtis Wilson provide minute-by-minute perspective and analysis from a central studio location during footage. Local residents from the communities of featured departments are given the opportunity to have a firsthand experience during ride-alongs with officers on live nights.

releases.title: Mrs. Revenge
releases.synopsis: The heroine Keung Hang-yu, who is suffering from cancer, witnessed the adultery between her husband and her only best friend. After being poisoned, she was reborn and returned to five years ago to start her own counterattack story.

releases.title: Gardeners' World
releases.synopsis: Gardeners' World is a long-running BBC Television programme about gardening, first broadcast in 1968 and still running as of 2013. Its first episode was presented by Ken Burras and came from Oxford Botanical Gardens. The magazine BBC Gardeners' World is a tie-in to the programme. Most of its episodes have been 30 minutes in length, although there are many specials that last longer. The 2008 and 2009 series used a 60-minute format.

releases.title: WE RIIZE
releases.synopsis: "WE RIIZE" is a variety show featuring the members of the K-pop group RIIZE engaging in entertaining activities, providing fans a closer look at the group's dynamics outside of their musical performances.

releases.title: RE: European Stories
releases.synopsis: Discover Europe in all its diversity of viewpoints

releases.title: Terra Forte
releases.synopsis: Presumed dead for nearly twenty years, Flor reappears in Azores with a revelation capable of shaking the past and reshaping the present: her disappearance was not an accident, as everyone believed. The reunion with those who thought they had lost her forever, including a former love, reopens deep wounds and sets in motion a dangerous quest for justice.

releases.title: The Elusive Samurai
releases.synopsis: Set between the Kamakura and Muromachi periods, during the Kenmu Restoration, the story follows the tale of Hojo Tokiyuki, a boy on the run after his family is overthrown by Ashikaga Takauji. With his only allies being a shady priest and his followers, the young lord must seek revenge and regain his glory, with his only weapon: a superhuman ability to flee and hide.

releases.title: The Great Ruler
releases.synopsis: In the vast world, planes converge and numerous races thrive. A gathering of extraordinary talents unfolds, where one after another, supreme beings from the lower planes come forth. In this boundless realm, they weave captivating legends that inspire admiration, pursuing the path to dominance.

releases.title: Washington Week with The Atlantic
releases.synopsis: Journalists participate in a round-table discussion of news events in this award-winning public affairs series. It first aired in 1967, making it the longest-running prime-time news and public affairs program on television.

releases.title: Love After Lockup
releases.synopsis: Couples finally meet their fiancé upon prison release. Once the bars are gone, will their love survive after lockup on the rocky road to the altar? Will the inmates ditch their mate as they face shocking "firsts", fights & family drama! Is it true love or just a con?

releases.title: Uprising
releases.synopsis: Through an AI-driven reinterpretation of Mexican Revolution footage captured by the country's cinema pioneers, this documentary offers a fresh look at a pivotal historical moment. It traces the movement's rise, peak, and fall, the birth of a new nation, and invites us to question the narratives that have shaped our identity and the present we inhabit.

releases.title: Ex on the Beach
releases.synopsis: To find new love, a group of hot singles moves into a luxury villa in Mexico. Among the women and men are well-known reality stars who are looking for love in front of the camera again.

releases.title: Our Lives

releases.title: CNN Headline Express

releases.title: Hyell's Club
releases.synopsis: Variety Show with actress and singer Lee Hyeri.

releases.title: PBS News Hour
releases.synopsis: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

releases.title: This Week in Evolution
releases.synopsis: This Week in Evolution is a podcast on the biology of what makes us tick. Hosts Nels Elde and Vincent Racaniello take you through the new evolution that has been revolutionized by the field of genomics and molecular biology.

releases.title: Daily Dose of Dana
releases.synopsis: Your daily hit of everything you're not supposed to care about (but definitely do). Every day, Dana breaks down the biggest celebrity drama, wildest scandals, messiest reality TV moments, and true crime cases that have everyone talking — with zero filter and maximum snark. Think of it as catching up with your most plugged-in friend who somehow already knows everything before it hits the group chat. New episodes drop daily M-F, so you're never behind on the chaos!

releases.title: Locked On Nuggets - Daily Podcast On The Denver Nuggets
releases.synopsis: Locked On Nuggets podcast is your daily ticket to stay ahead of the game and the first to know the latest news, analysis, and insider info for the Denver Nuggets and the NBA. Hosts Matt Moore, Swipa, and Ryan Blackburn delve deep and provide your daily Nuggets fix with expert, local analysis and coverage of all aspects of the Nuggets franchise. Locked On Nuggets takes you beyond the scoreboard for the inside scoops on the biggest stories from within the Nuggets locker room and all over the NBA.

A Running Podcast produced for and by the Culture!!

releases.synopsis: Covering powered land, AI infra, Wall Street ratings, local data center politics, operational updates, executive interviews. Join Colin and Charlie to understand what's happening in data centers!

releases.title: LearnDoBecome Radio
